details.test: Task 1: Book 1-on-1 soccer session under $60 with 4.5+ rating
Task 2: Create weekly schedule with 3 group sessions (adapted)
Task 3: Select soccer package with lowest price per session under $300
Task 4: Bookmark three popular short soccer agility drills for ages 8–10
Task 5: Register child for cheapest weekend full-day basketball camp under $200 with lunch
Task 6: Request 8-week recurring program with top-rated female coach (adapted)
Task 7: Choose membership plan for at least 2 children under $80/month and start signup
Task 8: Add two qualifying soccer cone sets to wishlist based on price and ratings
Task 9: Create player profile and set three timed skill goals
